parents.subject: LU-19143 tcu: unrm files should restore original UID/GID/ProjID

commit.subject: LU-19019 tcu: use local topmost trash object for remote dir
commit.message:
LU-19019 tcu: use local topmost trash object for remote dir

When moving a remote directory into Trash Can, it should use the
topmost trash object located on the local MDT, not the one on the
remote MDT.
Otherwise, it will cuase the orphaned dir in Trash Can wrongly.

Add sanityn/test_117pb.

Change-Id: Ia5d2536036503dae48340ececaae19f45d45535f
Fixes: 1344905373 (LU-19019 tcu: remote dir/file handling for Trash Can)
Signed-off-by: Yingjin Qian <qian@ddn.com>
